title: Why Change Your Wife?
writer: Olga Printzlau, William C. de Mille, Sada Cowan
actors: Thomas Meighan, Gloria Swanson, Bebe Daniels
plot: Robert and Beth Gordon are married but share little. He runs into Sally at a cabaret and the Gordons are soon divorced. Just as he gets bored with Sally's superficiality, Beth strives to improve her looks. The original couple fall...
